SELECT value, exp2(value) AS exp2_result FROM test_exp2 WHERE value >= 0;
SELECT exp2(value) + 2 AS adjusted_value FROM test_exp2 WHERE value < 0;
SELECT AVG(exp2(value)) AS average_exp2 FROM (SELECT value FROM test_exp2 WHERE value >= 0);
SELECT a.value, b.value, exp2(a.value + b.value) AS combined_exp2 FROM test_exp2 AS a JOIN test_exp2 AS b ON a.value = b.value WHERE a.value < 10;
SELECT exp2(x) FROM (SELECT value AS x FROM test_exp2 WHERE value > 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_exp2_composite AS SELECT value, exp2(value) AS exp2_result FROM test_exp2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_exp2_composite WHERE exp2_result > 100;
